title: Iran-Israel war LIVE: Trump again warns Iran to open Strait of Hormuz
snippet: U.S. President Donald Trump said that Iran had agreed to allow 20 ships carrying oil through the Strait of Hormuz starting on Monday (March 30, 2026) morning and continuing over the next few days as a sign of respect.

title: Trump Claims Iran Gave In to US Demands, Considers Seizing Oil - Bloomberg
snippet: President Donald Trump said that Iran gave the US most of the 15 demands it issued to Tehran to end the war, even as it remains unclear whether either side is negotiating.

title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Renews Threats Against Iranian Oil and Energy Facilities - NYT
snippet: President Trump claimed progress in talks to end the war but warned that lacking a deal he would order intense attacks on Iranian infrastructure targets. Oil and stock markets wavered on the news.

title: Live updates: Iran war news, Trump threatens to obliterate Iran's energy sources - CNN
snippet: President Donald Trump said the US may blow up and completely obliterate Iran's electric plants and oil wells if a deal to end the war is not reached.

title: Trump issues new threat to Iran's energy infrastructure if ceasefire isn't reached - PBS
snippet: Earlier comments to the Financial Times suggested American troops could seize Iran's Kharg Island oil export hub. Trump has repeatedly claimed to be making diplomatic progress.

title: US Stock Market Today: Futures Rise on Iran Talk Hopes Amid Oil Surge
snippet: Dow Jones Industrial Average futures rose around 280-300 points. S&P 500 futures and Nasdaq-100 futures each gained roughly 0.6%, pointing to a modestly positive open on Wall Street.

title: Oil Wavers, Stocks Fall on Mixed Signals in Middle East Talks - NYT
snippet: Oil prices rose on Monday as Yemen's Iran-backed Houthis fired missiles at Israel and Trump reportedly said he wants to take Iran's crude. S&P 500 fell 0.4% on Monday.

title: Trump: Deal to end war could be soon, Iran agreed to let 20 more boats through Hormuz - Times of Israel
snippet: US President Trump says a deal to end the war with Iran could be soon. Iran agreed to release 20 more cargo ships of oil through the Strait of Hormuz starting Monday.

title: Trump says serious talks occurring, threatens strikes on Iran energy, water sites - LA Times
snippet: Trump insisted diplomatic efforts will probably lead to a ceasefire deal soon. Trump threatened to destroy vital Iranian energy and water infrastructure if a peace deal is not reached.

title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Swings From Progress Claims to Fresh Iran Threats - Newsweek
snippet: Conservative commentators are increasingly using television to shape President Donald Trump's thinking on the war in Iran. Trump urged followers on Truth Social to watch Mark Levin's weekend Fox News program.

title: US may seize Kharg Island as Iran greenlights 20 oil ships through Strait of Hormuz - Fox News
snippet: President Donald Trump says Iran will allow 20 cargo ships to transport oil through the Strait of Hormuz on Monday. US Air Force B-52 Stratofortress deployed.

title: Fox News halted over Iran threat as viewers say Trump is not playing - Daily Express
snippet: Trump threatened to blow up and completely obliterate all of Iran's electric generating plants, oil wells, Kharg Island, and possible all desalinization plants, which we have purposely not touched.

title: Trump manipulates markets with early morning Iran announcement - The New Republic
snippet: At 4:12 PM ET on Sunday, Iran's Speaker of Parliament said pre-market news is a reverse indicator and if they dump the market then go long. Trump has been trying to manipulate the market to drive down oil prices, though it is not exactly working.

title: Live updates: Trump says US is negotiating with Iran after renewing threats to oil sites - AP News
snippet: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt had no comment on reports that American-made landmines have been spotted on the ground in Iran.

title: Oil prices rise after Trump says he wants to take Iran's crude, Houthi attacks on Israel - CNBC
snippet: Oil prices rose on Monday as Yemen's Iran-backed Houthis fired missiles at Israel and US President Donald Trump reportedly said he wants to take Iran's crude, deepening concerns over escalating risks to Middle East energy flows.

title: Brent crude rises after Trump says he wants to take the oil in Iran - The Guardian
snippet: Street stocks have pared gains, and the Nasdaq has turned negative. The S&P 500 is now up just 0.1% while the Dow Jones is 0.4% ahead, and the Nasdaq slipped by 0.1%.

title: 2025-2026 Iran-United States negotiations - Wikipedia
snippet: On March 30, Trump said Iran is begging for a deal. A US official described Iranian demands as ridiculous and unrealistic. Iran dismissed a US proposal as a wish list. April 6 deadline set.

title: 2026 Iran war - Wikipedia
snippet: Iran denied talks ever took place and called the president deceitful. Iran rejected the 15-point peace plan presented by the US. Iran asserted that Lebanon must be included as part of a ceasefire deal.

title: Wall St set for higher open after recent selloff, Mideast conflict widens - MarketScreener
snippet: S&P 500 -1.67%, NASDAQ 100 -1.93%, NASDAQ COMPOSITE -2.15%. Wall Street set for higher open amid Mideast conflict widening.

title: Trump Threatens Apocalyptic Consequences If Iran Does Not Negotiate - Daily Signal
snippet: Trump said a deal could be soon. He said great progress has been made. April 6 is the deadline Trump set on Truth Social for Iran to accept a deal or face US strikes on its energy sector.

title: Economic impact of the 2026 Iran war - Wikipedia
snippet: Financial Times investigation found selling futures 15 minutes before Trump published his statement on postponing attacks on Iran for talks on March 23, causing oil prices to fall. Insider trading speculation raised.

title: Trump pretty sure of Iran deal, but can Pakistan-led efforts end the war? - Al Jazeera
snippet: Trump confirmed indirect talks via Pakistani emissaries are progressing. April 6 deadline reiterated on Truth Social on March 26 for Iran to accept a deal or face US strikes on its energy sector.

title: S&P 500 closes lower Monday as oil prices continue their climb - CNBC
snippet: Oil prices rose on Monday as Yemen's Iran-backed Houthis fired missiles at Israel and Trump reportedly said he wants to take Iran's crude, deepening concerns over escalating risks to Middle East energy flows.

title: US may seize Kharg Island as Iran greenlights 20 oil ships - Fox News Digital
snippet: A U.S. Air Force B-52 Stratofortress deployed. President Trump says Iran will allow 20 cargo ships to transport oil through the Strait of Hormuz on Monday as a sign of respect.

title: Iran claims US-Israeli strikes targeting civilian sites as Rubio expects war to end in weeks - BBC
snippet: Trump's Special Envoy Steve Witkoff says the US is hopeful of having meetings with Iran this week, and Washington expects an answer to the 15-point deal on the table.
